scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @property-booking/auth db:migrate && pnpm --filter @property-booking/property db:migrate && pnpm --filter @property-booking/booking db:migrate && pnpm --filter @property-booking/payment db:migrate
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter @property-booking/auth db:seed && pnpm --filter @property-booking/property db:seed && pnpm --filter @property-booking/booking db:seed && pnpm --filter @property-booking/payment db:seed
